title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Proof Before Settlement Institutional Research Lab v30
coreThesis: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.
standard: No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement.
targetDecision: Should a blockchain project be trusted, funded, upgraded, partnered with, or treated as settlement-ready?
answer: Only after the proof package exists, passes review, and produces an explicit receipt-bound decision.
executiveActions: Require proof packages for material milestones.
Attach receipts to treasury, grant, audit, and upgrade decisions.
Use accepted proof as institutional memory, not raw marketing.
